ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi appeared by zoom for Jennifer Selvitella (administrator).
Deborah Fox (guardian ad litem for Jonathan Minkey and Robert James Minkey) appeared by zoom.

Mrs. Alavi stated that Attorney Jessica Rowe is working on drafting a petition for a guardianship for Robert in San Mateo County, and that the hiccup was choosing a bank for the blocked account and how the IRA is to be distributed. Mrs. Alavi also stated that she feels the court should grant final distribution, that Mrs. McIntyre has known about this, that Mrs. McIntyre is causing delay and harm to Sade, and that the $10,000.00 reserve is enough to cover the guardian ad litem's fees. The Petition for Discharge of Guardian Ad Litem, etc., and the accounting petition are under submission with the court's intent to grant. Mrs. Alavi will e-mail a revised proposed order to the probate examiner. Mrs. Fox will petition to be discharged in the Robert Minkey matter. Status of Robert's guardianship is set for July 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Title To And Transfer Of Property To Estate
Off Calendar May-26-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Avid Alavi appeared by zoom for and with Jennifer Selvitella by zoom.
John Minton (litigation counsel) appeared by zoom for and with Jennifer Selvitella by zoom.
Nancy Lofdahl appeared by zoom for Jesica McIntyre (ex-spouse/objector).
Deborah Fox appeared by zoom as Guardian Ad Litem for Robert Minkey and Jonathan Minkey (minor children).

Mrs. Lofadhl stated that she is withdrawing her objections. Mrs. Alavi stated that she spoke with TD Ameritrade and whatever the court orders they will follow. Mr. Minton stated he will submit a corrected proposed order to the court. The petition to determine title to and transfer of property to estate is taken under submission with the intent to grant. (except for the finding that Decedent's children are the proper distributees of the IRA).

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Title To And Transfer Of Property To Estate
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Continued To May-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi appeared by zoom for and with Jennifer Selvitella by zoom.
John Minton (litigation counsel) appeared by zoom for and with Jennifer Selvitella by zoom.
Nancy Lofdahl appeared by zoom for Jesica McIntyre (ex-spouse/objector).
Deborah Fox appeared by zoom as Guardian Ad Litem for Robert Minkey and Jonathan Minkey (minor children).

Mr. Minton stated that the 8037 TD Ameritrade account was established as an IRA roll over account at the beginning of the marriage, that no further contributions were made, that the only beneficiary of that account was Jesica McIntyre, and that because of the divorce by operation of law, it sees her as predeceased. Mr. Minton also expressed concern about delay and stated that these funds need to go out to the estate and to the decedent's three children. Mrs. Alavi stated that the 8037 account/stocks is in very high-risk investments, that she believes the value of the account has gone down and that no one has access to these accounts. Mrs. Lofdahl stated that she is fine with giving the administrator authority to change the investments, and that she can file her objections within 10-days. The Petition to Determine Title to and Transfer of Property to Estate is continued to May 23, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Objections are to be filed by May 16, 2023 otherwise they will deemed waived. The parties can file an ex parte petition for authority to deal with the investments.
Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Continued To May-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Avid Eli Alavi appearing via zoom for (administrator) Jennifer Selvitella.

Mrs. Alavi stated to the Court that there is a petition pending in the Courts Efiling queue. and that the estate is not ready for close due to pending related litigation regarding the retirement account. The Court acknowledges Mrs. Alavi's oral report and continues the matter to May 01, 2023, at 9:00am in dept. 204, to allow for review of final pending petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Petition For Payment Of Family Allowance (Probate Code Sections 6540-6545); And Petition To Repay Child Support Payments Made By Paternal Grandmother
Off Calendar Oct-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi, via Zoom, for and with Jennifer Selvitella, Administrator; Deborah Fox, via Zoom, Guardian ad Litem, for and with Robert and Jonathan Minkey, Minors.

Ms. Fox advises that the minors believe that the proposed allowance is insufficient and wish to discuss options. Ms. Alavi advises that the allowance is pursuant to a child support order and therefore the Minor's request should be made to the Family Law Division. The court confirms Ms. Alavi's testimony and advises that it intends to grant the instant petition.

The Petition for Payment of Family Allowance, etc., is granted. The order is executed in open court.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.
